scripts.postlint: tsc -p . && eclint check $(git ls-files | xargs find 2> /dev/null | grep -vE 'node_modules|\.git' | grep -v dist/)
scripts.postversion: auto-changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md && git commit --no-edit --amend && git tag -f "v$(node -e "console.log(require('./package.json').version)")"

scripts.test:node20: cd test; npx tsc; node compiled/test/index.js

scripts.test: xo && node --import=tsx/esm --test test/*.ts && del-cli dist && tsc && tsd

scripts.ci:coverage: nyc pnpm test && nyc report --reporter=text-lcov > coverage.lcov

scripts.postversion: auto-changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md && git commit --no-edit --amend && git tag -f "v$(node -e "console.log(require('./package.json').version)")"

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run lint && tsc && mocha
